'''鈭歨-ng-ng''' ('''hanganga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yankify|yankify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yankify|yankify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-ng-ng
|-
! Lemma
| hanganga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hangangithi|hangangithi]] || [[word:hangangiji|hangangiji]] || [[word:hangangishi|hangangishi]] || [[word:hangangi|hangangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanganguthuth|hanganguthuth]] || [[word:hangangujuj|hangangujuj]] || [[word:hangangushush|hangangushush]] || [[word:hangang|hangang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanganguthu|hanganguthu]] || [[word:hanganguju|hanganguju]] || [[word:hangangushu|hangangushu]] || [[word:hangangu|hangangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangangufuth|hangangufuth]] || [[word:hangangufuj|hangangufuj]] || [[word:hangangufush|hangangufush]] || [[word:hanganguf|hanganguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hangangethe|hangangethe]] || [[word:hangangeje|hangangeje]] || [[word:hangangeshe|hangangeshe]] || [[word:hangange|hangange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangangothoth|hangangothoth]] || [[word:hangangojoj|hangangojoj]] || [[word:hangangoshosh|hangangoshosh]] || [[word:hangang|hangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangangotho|hangangotho]] || [[word:hangangojo|hangangojo]] || [[word:hangangosho|hangangosho]] || [[word:hangango|hangango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangangofoth|hangangofoth]] || [[word:hangangofoj|hangangofoj]] || [[word:hangangofosh|hangangofosh]] || [[word:hangangof|hangangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hangang忙th忙|hangang忙th忙]] || [[word:hangang忙j忙|hangang忙j忙]] || [[word:hangang忙sh忙|hangang忙sh忙]] || [[word:hangang忙|hangang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangangathath|hangangathath]] || [[word:hangangajaj|hangangajaj]] || [[word:hangangashash|hangangashash]] || [[word:hangang|hangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangangatha|hangangatha]] || [[word:hangangaja|hangangaja]] || [[word:hangangasha|hangangasha]] || [[word:hanganga|hanganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangangafath|hangangafath]] || [[word:hangangafaj|hangangafaj]] || [[word:hangangafash|hangangafash]] || [[word:hangangaf|hangangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hangangasha|hangangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohangangasha|gohangangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihangangasha|gokihangangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hangangn眉sha|hangangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohangangnkn眉sha|gohangangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihangangn眉sha|gokihangangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hangangsh毛sha|hangangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohangangnksh毛sha|gohangangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihangangsh毛sha|gokihangangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hangangrosha|hangangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohangangnkrosha|gohangangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihangangrosha|gokihangangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hangangmusha|hangangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohangangnkmusha|gohangangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihangangmusha|gokihangangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hangangsherasha|hangangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohangangnksherasha|gohangangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihangangsherasha|gokihangangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hangangasha|hangangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohangangnkngasha|gohangangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihangangasha|gokihangangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hangangyasha|hangangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohangangnkyasha|gohangangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihangangyasha|gokihangangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hangangyamasha|hangangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohangangnkyamasha|gohangangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihangangyamasha|gokihangangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hangangn眉sh毛sha|hangangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohangangnkn眉sh毛sha|gohangangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihangangn眉sh毛sha|gokihangangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hangangn眉rosha|hangangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohangangnkn眉rosha|gohangangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihangangn眉rosha|gokihangangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hangangn眉musha|hangangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohangangnkn眉musha|gohangangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihangangn眉musha|gokihangangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hangangsh毛n眉sha|hangangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohangangnksh毛n眉sha|gohangangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihangangsh毛n眉sha|gokihangangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hangangsh毛rosha|hangangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohangangnksh毛rosha|gohangangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihangangsh毛rosha|gokihangangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hangangsh毛musha|hangangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohangangnksh毛musha|gohangangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihangangsh毛musha|gokihangangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hangangron眉sha|hangangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohangangnkron眉sha|gohangangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihangangron眉sha|gokihangangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hangangrosh毛sha|hangangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohangangnkrosh毛sha|gohangangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihangangrosh毛sha|gokihangangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hangangromusha|hangangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohangangnkromusha|gohangangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihangangromusha|gokihangangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hangangmun眉sha|hangangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohangangnkmun眉sha|gohangangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihangangmun眉sha|gokihangangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hangangmush毛sha|hangangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohangangnkmush毛sha|gohangangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihangangmush毛sha|gokihangangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hangangmurosha|hangangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohangangnkmurosha|gohangangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihangangmurosha|gokihangangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hangang|hangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙ng忙ng|h忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohangang|hohangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙ng忙ng|hoh忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohangang|hohohangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙ng忙ng|hohoh忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉hangang|n眉hangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙ng忙ng|n眉h忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉hangang|n眉n眉hangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙ng忙ng|n眉n眉h忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂hangang|n茂hangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙ng忙ng|n茂h忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂hangang|n茂n茂hangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙ng忙ng|n茂n茂h忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhangang|luhangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙ng忙ng|luh忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhangang|luluhangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙ng忙ng|luluh忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihangang|lihangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙ng忙ng|lih忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihangang|lilihangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙ng忙ng|lilih忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohangang|kohangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙ng忙ng|koh忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohangang|kokohangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙ng忙ng|kokoh忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehangang|kehangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙ng忙ng|keh忙ng忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehangang|kekehangang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙ng忙ng|kekeh忙ng忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
